steps.title: Use a convenient input
steps.content:
The expression equals
$$\frac{a}{4}x^2+\frac{b}{4}x+\frac{c}{4}$$
For $x=1$, this becomes
$$\frac{a+b+c}{4}$$

steps.title: Find the coefficient sum
steps.content: Set the two expressions equal: $$\frac{a+b+c}{4}=-44$$ $$a+b+c=-176$$ The answer is A.
